title: Continuous random variables
summary: 9709 S2 — PDF, CDF, expectation, and variance for continuous distributions.
learningObjectives: Find E(X) and Var(X) by integration.

simpleExplanation.title: Continuous X
simpleExplanation.summary: P(X = exact value) = 0 for continuous variables. Probabilities are areas under the PDF.
steps: P(a ≤ X ≤ b) = area under f between a and b.

sections.content: **Continuous RVs** (6.3) require careful **integration limits**. Sketch the PDF before integrating.
